notes: Candidate denominator for Fase 3 exit criterion.
Includes noncoding and deprecated Ensembl IDs; not the candidate denominator.
HPA uses Ensembl IDs plus gene names in bulk files.
Symbol coverage is secondary to Ensembl mapping.
UniProt reviewed entries can include accessions not listed in HGNC uniprot_ids; symbol matching is used in master map when HGNC accessions are absent.
